device.label: Serial device path
device.help: e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0 or /dev/ttyAMA0. Must be readable by the ioBroker process.

baudRate.label: Baud rate
baudRate.help: Panasonic Aquarea always uses 9600 8E1. Do not change unless you have a custom transceiver.

pollIntervalSec.label: Poll interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSec.help: How often to query the heat pump. HeishaMon defaults to 5 seconds.

extraPollEnabled.label: Poll the extra data block (K/L series only)
extraPollEnabled.help: Adds 6 additional 16-bit energy datapoints. Harmless on older models.

optionalPcbPollEnabled.label: Send optional-PCB poll frames (not yet implemented)
optionalPcbPollEnabled.help: Reserved for future SG-Ready / external thermostat support. Currently has no effect.

readOnlyMode.label: Read-only mode (passive listening)
readOnlyMode.help: Do not send any polls or set commands. Decode and store frames sent by another master on the bus (e.g. HeishaMon during Phase-4 parallel operation).
